title: Verify Which Metrics Are Present on the ACB System Statistics Screen
summary: Use the documented ACB System Statistics screen to confirm that the expected statistics fields are present on the HMI. This procedure is limited to verifying field presence on the screen and does not interpret values, limits, or corrective actions.
when_to_use: Use when you need to confirm that the ACB System Statistics screen includes the documented metrics shown in the manual: robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to interpret metric meanings, limits, thresholds, or normal ranges.
Do not use this procedure as a troubleshooting or corrective-action procedure for abnormal values.
Do not use this procedure to infer missing controls, hidden fields, or undocumented screen behavior.

responsibilities: Access the ACB System Statistics screen from the ACB System screen.
Visually confirm whether the documented metric fields are present.
Record any missing documented metric fields for follow-up.

safety_notes: This candidate is a screen-reference verification and is marked support safe.
The source only documents field presence and screen purpose; do not infer meanings, limits, or corrective actions for displayed values.
access_or_tools_needed: Figure 4-5 or equivalent documented screen reference

system_preconditions: ACB System screen is available so STATISTICS can be pressed to access the ACB System Statistics screen.

visual_references.description: Figure 4-5 ACB System Statistics Screen showing the documented statistics display and referenced metric fields.

steps.title: Open the ACB System Statistics screen
steps.purpose: Access the documented HMI screen used for this verification.
steps.instruction: From the "ACB System" screen, press STATISTICS to open the ACB System Statistics screen.
steps.expected_result: The ACB System Statistics screen is displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The statistics screen opens and can be viewed for field verification.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB System Statistics screen does not open or cannot be viewed from the ACB System screen.

actions.label: Open statistics screen
actions.exact_action: Press STATISTICS on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use Figure 4-5 as the reference for the ACB System Statistics screen reached from the ACB System screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ACB System Statistics screen cannot be accessed from the ACB System screen.
The displayed screen does not match the documented ACB System Statistics screen reference.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press STATISTICS on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen. This screen provides a variety of statistical information.

steps.title: Identify the documented statistics fields on the screen
steps.purpose: Establish the set of fields that the source says should be present on the ACB System Statistics screen.
steps.instruction: Review the ACB System Statistics screen and identify the documented statistics fields shown there: robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts.
steps.expected_result: The operator has identified the documented fields to verify on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows the documented categories of statistics referenced by the manual.
steps.failure_condition: One or more documented categories cannot be located on the displayed screen.

actions.label: Review statistics layout
actions.exact_action: Identify the statistics fields shown on the ACB System Statistics screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Review the Figure 4-5 layout and locate the documented statistics fields on the ACB System Statistics screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen content does not show the documented statistics categories.
The displayed screen appears inconsistent with Figure 4-5.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This screen provides a variety of statistical information, including the number of robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts.

steps.title: Verify robot faults value is present
steps.purpose: Confirm that the robot faults metric documented by the source is present on the screen.
steps.instruction: Check the ACB System Statistics screen and verify that a robot faults value is present.
steps.expected_result: A robot faults value is visible on the ACB System Statistics screen.
steps.healthy_condition: A robot faults field or value is present on the screen.
steps.failure_condition: No robot faults field or value is present on the screen.

actions.label: Check robot faults field
actions.exact_action: Verify that a robot faults value is present on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Locate the robot faults value on the ACB System Statistics screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The robot faults value is not present on the ACB System Statistics screen.

steps.failure_condition: No system faults field or value is present on the screen.

steps.title: Verify tipping station bag counts are present
steps.purpose: Confirm that the tipping station bag count metrics documented by the source are present on the screen.
steps.instruction: Check the ACB System Statistics screen and verify that tipping station bag counts are present.
steps.expected_result: Tipping station bag count information is visible on the ACB System Statistics screen.
steps.healthy_condition: Tipping station bag count fields or values are present on the screen.

steps.title: Record any missing documented metric fields
steps.purpose: Capture discrepancies between the documented screen content and the observed HMI screen for follow-up.
steps.instruction: Record any documented metric fields that are missing from the ACB System Statistics screen for follow-up.
steps.expected_result: Any missing documented fields are noted for follow-up.
steps.healthy_condition: All documented fields are present, or any missing fields are clearly recorded.
steps.failure_condition: Missing documented fields are observed but not recorded, or the discrepancy is left unresolved.

actions.label: Document missing fields
actions.exact_action: Record any missing documented metric fields for follow-up.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use Figure 4-5 as the documented reference when noting any missing metric fields.

stop_or_escalate_if: One or more documented metric fields are not present on the ACB System Statistics screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This screen provides a variety of statistical information, including the number of robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts.

source_evidence.note: Candidate escalation note: Escalate if one or more documented metric fields are not present on the ACB System Statistics screen.

success_criteria: The ACB System Statistics screen is accessed from the ACB System screen.
The presence of the documented metrics is confirmed: robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts.
Any missing documented metric fields are recorded for follow-up.
healthy_conditions: The ACB System Statistics screen matches the documented Figure 4-5 reference.
Robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts are all present on the screen.
failure_conditions: The ACB System Statistics screen cannot be accessed from the ACB System screen.
One or more documented metric fields are not present on the ACB System Statistics screen.
The displayed screen cannot be matched to the documented ACB System Statistics screen reference.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if one or more documented metric fields are not present on the ACB System Statistics screen.
Escalate if the ACB System Statistics screen cannot be accessed or does not match the documented Figure 4-5 reference.
Do not infer corrective actions from displayed values because the source only documents field presence and screen purpose.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Primary visual reference for the ACB System Statistics screen and its documented metric fields.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: This screen provides a variety of statistical information, including the number of robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts.

missing_details: The source does not provide thresholds, normal ranges, or interpretation guidance for the displayed values.
The source does not provide troubleshooting or corrective actions if a metric field is missing.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required; these fields remain unknown.
